message:
test(wave-71): trait coverage for saga, lyapunov, dialectica, websocket/handshake

12 new tests covering Debug/Clone/Copy/Hash/Default/PartialEq/Eq derives
across SagaOpKind, SagaStep, StepResult, PotentialWeights,
SchedulingSuggestion, PotentialRecord, DialecticaContract, ContractChecker,
DialecticaMorphism, WsUrl, ServerHandshake, HttpRequest.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
